name: Suspicious TLS JA3 Fingerprint
description: Detects known malicious JA3 TLS fingerprints from threat intelligence
query:
// Suspicious JA3 Detection (NDR)
// Configure known-bad JA3 hashes in the in() list below
events from ndr_flow
where protocol = "tls"
  and ja3_hash != ""
group by source_ip, destination_ip, ja3_hash
having count(*) >= 1
within 300 seconds
